name: Pretzel Candies
recipeInstructions:
1. Break the pretzels into thirds.
2. Add the nuts to the broken pretzels.
3. Melt the chocolate according to package directions.
4. Pour the melted chocolate over the pretzels and nuts, stirring to ensure all are covered.
5. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto wax paper on a cookie sheet.
6. Refrigerate for about 10 minutes.
7. Pack into an airtight container to store. Like Guittard Melt N Mold for Candy Making.
